Dialog.name: MND_WEEKDAYS_0409
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It feels like I had a strange dream...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...It's time to go to school.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HOLIDAY_0429
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Today is Showa Day. There's no school.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, I should be able[n]to connect to the Internet now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I could try playing the game[n]that Junpei gave me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HOLIDAY_0503
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Today is Constitution Day... It's the beginning[n]of the three-day holiday, Golden Week.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, that home shopping[n]program on TV will be on during the day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_WEEKDAYS_0518
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}First semester midterm exams begin[n]today and will last for six days...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_WEEKDAYS_0523
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Today is the last day of the midterm exams.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_WEEKDAYS_0525
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Exam results will be posted today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_WEEKDAYS_0606
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I have to remember that[n]I have plans tonight...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_WEEKDAYS_0608
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}That story I heard at the[n]outskirts of the station...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I have to ask the teacher about the[n]missing girl, Fuuka Yamagishi, today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_WEEKDAYS_0714
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}First semester final exams begin[n]today and will last for five days...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HOLIDAY_0720
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The trip to Yakushima begins today and[n]will last for four days, three nights.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I need to get ready...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_WEEKDAYS_0724
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Exam results will be posted today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HOLIDAY_0726
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Summer vacation begins today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HOLIDAY_0727
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The special training for track[n]and field begins today...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's about time to leave...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HOLIDAY_0728_0731
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The special training for track[n]and field continues today too...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's about time to leave...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HOLIDAY_0801
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Today is the last day of special training...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HOLIDAY_0802
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Today is the track and field competition...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's about time to leave...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HOLIDAY_0810
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Summer school starts today...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's about time to leave...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HOLIDAY_0814
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's almost time to head to summer school.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I need to stop by Tatsumi Memorial[n]Hospital on the way back later today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HOLIDAY_0816
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Summer vacation continues...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, there's a summer[n]festival going on at Naganaki Shrine today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HolidayNoon_0826
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Summer vacation will be over soon...[n]The film festival is almost over, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should invite someone[n]from the dorm to go with me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_WEEKDAYS_0901
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The second semester begins today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HOLIDAY_0921
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I seem to have slept for a long time...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It appears the typhoon has passed.[n]Through the window, the sky looks clear.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel refreshed.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Today is Respect for the Aged Day.[n]The holiday lasts until the 23rd...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_WEEKDAYS_1005
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yesterday was a terrible tragedy...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}However, I must still go to school today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_WEEKDAYS_1013
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Second semester midterm exams begin[n]today and will last for five days...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HOLIDAY_FULLMOON1103
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There will be a full moon tonight.[n]A powerful Shadow will appear.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The final battle is nearly upon us...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should stay home today[n]and conserve my strength.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_WEEKDAYS_1105
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yesterday was a shocking turn of events...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wonder if Mitsuru will be all right...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}What's going to happen to us all now...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_WEEKDAYS_1124
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Career experience week will take[n]place over the next four days...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_WEEKDAYS_1214
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Second semester final exams begin[n]today and will last for six days...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_WEEKDAYS_1226
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Today is the last day of[n]the second semester...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}So much has happened this semester...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...Anyway, I better get to school.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HOLIDAY_1227
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Winter vacation begins today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HOLIDAY_1231
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Today is New Year's Eve...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HOLIDAY_0101
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's New Year's Day...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_WEEKDAYS_0108
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The third semester begins today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HOLIDAY_0131
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Today is the Promised Day...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}At last, we can confront[n]Nyx at the top of Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I suspect that once we enter[n]Tartarus tonight, we won't be able[n]to leave until the battle is over.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HOLIDAY_FULLMOON
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There will be a full moon tonight.[n]A powerful Shadow will appear.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should stay home today[n]and conserve my strength.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_ERROR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This message appears for all other dates than those above.[n]{f 1 1}
